---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a FengShui Master capability, reference, adapter, script, or sample
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the user problem or consultation scenario this would support.

## Domain

Which area does this affect: spatial feng shui, broad symbolic analysis, finance, business, brand, career, relationship, product, learning, wellbeing, legal-adjacent, yin house, timing, or another domain?

## Feng shui school or source basis

Name the feng shui school, lineage, classic, source family, or modern adaptation involved. If this is a symbolic cross-domain feature, say how yin-yang, five phases, bagua, form/flow, timing, or ji/xiong are being used.

## Safety guardrails

Explain any guardrails needed. For example: not financial advice, not medical advice, not legal advice, no deterministic fate claims, no guaranteed wealth/health/relationship/disaster outcomes.

## Acceptance checks

- [ ] Adds or updates the relevant reference, script, sample, or test.
- [ ] Keeps domain reality separate from feng shui symbolism.
- [ ] Includes source or lineage notes when making specialized claims.
- [ ] Keeps recommendations practical, low-risk, and reversible where possible.
